response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages and platforms, but lacks the core mandatory qualifications for this role. No substantial recent C++ experience (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain exposure. The resume reads as a web/full-stack engineer rather than a C++ capital markets developer.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and pairing practice
Broad polyglot experience across backend, frontend, and embedded systems
Demonstrated communication skills via talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ exposure (2014-2015), well short of the 5-10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience shown

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
